emails.subject: Dental Appt.
emails.body: Dental Appt. Good Morning Marnie Yesterday I made a dental appt. for Monday, Dec. 11th 5pm but I need to leave at 4pm to get there on time. I have to finish a root canal that was started several months ago. Do you foresee a problem with me leaving at 4pm that day?

emails.subject: Re: Dental Appt.
emails.body: Re: Dental Appt. That should not be a problem. Rufino said he can cover for you. You may ask if you can cover for him for part of the morning since he gets here early. From: Dana Davis ECT 12/08/2000 09:19 AM
